<!-- Provide a clear, concise description of your change. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` – New feature
- [ ] `fix` – Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` – Tooling / deps / config
- [ ] `docs` – Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` – Code change, no behavior change
- [ ] `test` – Tests only

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named `<type>/<description>` and based on the latest `main`
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check` / `npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest` / `npm test`) and new code is covered
- [ ] DB schema changes include an Alembic migration
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env` stays out of git; `.env.example` updated if needed)
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant

<!-- Optional: UI screenshots, testing notes, or anything reviewers should know. -->
